item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-15484 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-15484 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
The Order Notification for WooCommerce WordPress plugin before 3.6.3 overrides WooCommerce's permission checks to grant full access to all unauthenticated requests, enabling complete read/write access to store resources like products, coupons, and customers.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-15484

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-34381 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-34381 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Admidio is an open-source user management solution. From version 5.0.0 to before version 5.0.8, Admidio relies on adm_my_files/.htaccess to deny direct HTTP access to uploaded documents. The Docker image ships with AllowOverride None in the Apache configuration, which causes Apache to silently ignore all .htaccess files. As a result, any file uploaded to the documents module regardless of the role-based permissions c...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34381

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8143-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8143-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - Cryptographic API; - GPU drivers; - BTRFS file system; - GFS2 file system; - UDF file system; - NFC subsystem; - Network traffic control; (CVE-2021-47142, CVE-2021-47145, CVE-2021-47254, CVE-2024-46777, CVE-2025-21735, CVE-2026-23060, CVE...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8143-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-34397 - Azure
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-34397 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.3
Resumo:
Himmelblau is an interoperability suite for Microsoft Azure Entra ID and Intune. From versions 2.0.0-alpha to before 2.3.9 and 3.0.0-alpha to before 3.1.1, there is a conditional local privilege escalation vulnerability in an edge-case naming collision. Only authenticated himmelblau users whose mapped CN/short name exactly matches a privileged local group name (e.g., "sudo", "wheel", "docker", "adm") can cause the NS...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34397

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-2480 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-2480 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
The WP Shortcodes Plugin — Shortcodes Ultimate plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'max_width' attribute of the `su_box` shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 7.4.10 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on user supplied attributes. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web s...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2480

item.title: [Segurança] Apple expands iOS 18 updates to more iPhones to block DarkSword attacks
item.description:
💣 Apple expands iOS 18 updates to more iPhones to block DarkSword attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Apple has now made it possible for more iPhones still running iOS 18 to receive security updates that protect against the actively exploited DarkSword exploit kit.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/apple-expands-ios-18-updates-to-more-iphones-to-block-darksword-attacks/

item.title: [Segurança] Hackers exploit TrueConf zero-day to push malicious software updates
item.description:
💣 Hackers exploit TrueConf zero-day to push malicious software updates
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hackers have targeted TrueConf conference servers in attacks that exploit a zero-day vulnerability, allowing them to execute arbitrary files on all connected endpoints.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-exploit-trueconf-zero-day-to-push-malicious-software-updates/

item.title: [Segurança] Adversaries Exploit Vacant Homes to Intercept Mail in Hybrid Cybercrime
item.description:
💣 Adversaries Exploit Vacant Homes to Intercept Mail in Hybrid Cybercrime
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Threat actors are exploiting vacant homes as "drop addresses" to intercept mail and enable fraud. Flare shows how postal services and fake identities are abused to turn mail into a fraud vector.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/adversaries-exploit-vacant-homes-to-intercept-mail-in-hybrid-cybercrime/

Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Nginx. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.

item.title: [Segurança] Apple Expands iOS 18.7.7 Update to More Devices to Block DarkSword Exploit
item.description:
💣 Apple Expands iOS 18.7.7 Update to More Devices to Block DarkSword Exploit
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.7
Resumo:
Apple on Wednesday expanded the availability of iOS 18.7.7 and iPadOS 18.7.7 to a broader range of devices to protect users from the risk posed by a recently disclosed exploit kit known as DarkSword. "We enabled the availability of iOS 18.7.7 for more devices on April 1, 2026, so users with Automatic Updates turned on can automatically receive important security
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/apple-expands-ios-1877-update-to-more.html

Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS

Resumo:

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8144-1: Undertow vulnerability
item.description:
📰 USN-8144-1: Undertow vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Undertow incorrectly validated the Host header in incoming HTTP requests. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to gain unintended access to user sessions.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8144-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8139-1: cargo-c vulnerability
item.description:
📰 USN-8139-1: cargo-c vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that tar-rs embedded in cargo-c incorrectly handled symlinks when unpacking a tar archive. If a user or automated system were tricked into processing a specially crafted tar archive, a remote attacker could use this issue to modify permissions of arbitrary directories outside the extraction root, and possibly escalate privileges.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8139-1

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Applying GitOps Principles to Maintain Desired State Configuration using VMware vSphere Configuration Profile – Part 3
item.description:
📰 Applying GitOps Principles to Maintain Desired State Configuration using VMware vSphere Configuration Profile – Part 3
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Welcome back to the third blog post in the Automating vSphere Configuration Profile (VCP) workflows series. In the first post, we explored the VCP APIs and the set of APIs required to work with vSphere Configuration Profiles. The second post focused on consuming these APIs using PowerCLI and the Unified SDK for Python, demonstrating how …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/02/applying-gitops-principles-to-maintain-desired-state-configuration-using-vmware-vsphere-configuration-profile-part-3/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Accelerate Database as a Service with new VMware Data Services Manager Proof of Value Service from AxelCore
item.description:
📰 Accelerate Database as a Service with new VMware Data Services Manager Proof of Value Service from AxelCore
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Deploying a private cloud Database-as-a-Service (DBaaS) Deploying a private cloud Database-as-a-Service (DBaaS) is rarely just a technical challenge; it’s also an organizational one. The technology behind VMware Data Services Manager (DSM) is proven to deliver massive productivity gains; however, many organizations find themselves stuck in pilot mode, wondering how quickly they’ll realize the value, and …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/01/accelerate-database-as-a-service-with-new-vmware-data-services-manager-proof-of-value-service-from-axelcore/
